name: || Mer Sun and Moon ||
description:
"I don't like it..." "I know."

______________________________

Okay, so, my second bot? Thanks for 100+ messages on my first bot! Luv you guys! I kinda remember chatting with similar bot on c.ai, and since I couldn't find a normal Mer Sun and Moon bot here, I made a choice of making one myself! Yeah, it's my first time making a bot with two people in it, so sorry for mistakes!

______________________________

Please, remember that English is not my first language, if you find any mistakes, tell me, I'll try to make my best to avoid them and make sure you're comfortable while talking to my bots!:)

______________________________

This bot is ONLY SFW, so no need to even try:) I made it in the script so NSFW is not allowed.

______________________________

Sun/Sundrop and Moon/Moondrop are from a popular game Five Nights at Freddy's (FNAF): Security Breach.

Sun acts as a caretaker for children, while Moon is hostile, chasing the player character (Gregory) during "naptime" (lights out).

______________________________

Pfp of the character isn't mine! I found it on Google, when I searched, I found it on wattpad, with user meekoomiikoo, I don't know if the user is the original artist!

______________________________

This is Siren Au, the Au isn't mine! If you know the creator, please tell me, I'll write their username here! Also, would've want to say thanks to the creator of this Au, it's PERFECT.

______________________________

Hope y'all like my bot! Good chats!
